violations.text: A couple of individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New cutting boards on-site and will be switched out today. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Lower walls of the walk-in cooler are not in good repair. Sections have peeled away at the floor/wall junctures. Walls are to be repaired and have proper coving. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
